reviews.comment:
Excelente recepción, excelente ubicación excelente  servicio, ideal para descansar de un largo viaje, tanto como para una noche,como para vacaciones, tiene todo lo necesario,habitaciones super cómodas, bien Equipadas: buena cama,WiFi, tele,heladerita, aire acondicionado,calefacción, baño super limpio, muy amplio y cómodo. Cochera.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent reception, excellent location, excellent service, ideal for resting after a long trip, whether for a night or for a vacation. It has everything you need, super comfortable rooms, well equipped: good bed, Wi-Fi, TV, refrigerator, air conditioning, heating, super clean bathroom, very spacious and comfortable. Parking.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPX0xQN3R3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Otra hermosa YPF, está con habitaciones para socios de ACA, las que no usamos porque íbamos de paso, cargamos combustible y merendamos en sus mesas y bancos de cemento a disposición en su jardín, además acompañados de los perros callejeros que viven en la misma atención, alimentados y vacunados x sus empleados,DIGNO DE SER VALORADO, FELICIDADES Y GRACIAS X CUIDAR DE ELLOS.

(Translated by Google)
Another beautiful YPF station, this one has rooms for ACA members, which we didn't use because we were just passing through. We filled up with fuel and had a snack at their cement tables and benches in their garden, accompanied by the stray dogs that live there, fed and vaccinated by their employees. Worthy of praise, congratulations and thank you for taking care of them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pCRFNrOVJjVkJpT1ZVMVZYRlNiMkZ5VURaaVJtYxAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente habitacion, monoambiente con baño privado, cama king size, frigobar, televisor, AA y calefaccion. Con el precio viene desayuno incluido que lo pedis en la full. Y ademas cada depto tiene estacionamiento techado para un vehiculo. Mejor imposible!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent room, studio apartment with private bathroom, king-size bed, minibar, TV, air conditioning, and heating. Breakfast is included in the price, which you can request with the full package. Each apartment also has covered parking for one vehicle. It couldn't be better!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGdFNWaHJTR2hhTTJvdGExSjRNbTVoZW00MFEwRRAB
